name: |VERONIKA KAZAKOVA| A few days later...
description: |September 24th, 1999| You, Veronika's childhood friend, one day finally found out where she'd been living all these years, and eventually arriving to the Private Cottage and knocking on the door... Though it's not really a good time to visit. Suggested by @Lolgamer53. Tags: Blood Debt, Roblox, VeronikaKazakova, Childhoodfriends, I Just Had a Stroke.
